name: Adrian C
achievements: Semifinalist and Top 10 Speaker, WOSO (2026)
Best Speaker, Stanford Invitational (2026)
Drexel Open (2026)
3rd Best Speaker, Team Canada Fundraiser (2025)
3rd Place, Carroll College Fundraiser (2025)
Broke at Oxford Schools (2025)
bio: An experienced educator with over five years of international debate experience. Adrian is an ICYD International Finalist (2023), broke Oxford Schools (2025), and was the 3rd Best Speaker at the Team Canada Fundraiser (2025). He has condensed his debate knowledge into a debate accelerator used by over 100 debaters in Hong Kong, the UK, and the US.

name: Gavin Z
achievements: Qualified for Tournament of Champions (TOC) in 2022 and 2023
Competed at Oxford Schools 2025
Nationally ranked on the China Public Forum circuit
bio: A nationally ranked Public Forum debater with a strong track record on the China PF circuit and five years of experience. Gavin reached Tournament of Champions(TOC) in both 2022 and 2023, and competed at Oxford Schools 2025. In his role as Executive Director, Gavin co-leads the team’s operations, spearheads the web development, and Chinese Outreach.

name: Sandeep Chulani
role: Advisor to DebateCraft and Head Curriculumn Developer
achievements: Ranked Top 10 judge in Asia at multiple Asian British Parliamentary Championships
Co-founder, HKBPDC
Former Chair, Hong Kong Schools Debating and Public Speaking Community
bio: Sandeep Chulani, a Hong Kong-based debate coach and educator with over 20 years of debating, coaching and judging experience, has been ranked among the Top 10 judges in Asia at multiple Asian British Parliamentary Championships, and co-founded the HKBPDC. Formerly the chair of Hong Kong Schools Debating and Public Speaking Community, he has led students onto the Hong Kong national squad and to WSDC, WIDPSC, and Oxford Schools.

name: Matthew W
achievements: Competed at Oxford and Cambridge Schools Finals Day
4 years of BP debating in the UK (IONA) circuit
2 years of coaching students to reach Oxford and Cambridge Schools Finals Day
bio: A competitive debater with four years of BP debating and adjudication experience. Matthew has competed at ICYD and Cambridge Schools, and currently serves as a Debate Society captain at Winchester. He brings over two years of coaching experience and extensive politics, economics, and international relations experience.

name: Bella C
achievements: Semifinalist and Top 10 Speaker, WOSO (2026)
Triple Octofinalist, US NSDA Nationals (2026)
Semifinalist and Top Open Breaking Team, Asia WSDC (2026)
Grand Champion, 40th Stanford Invitational (2026)
Finalist, UBC Spring HST (2026)
bio: Winning the 40th Stanford Invitational 2026 with her team and a UBC Spring HST 2026 finalist,Bella brings a strong competitive background and expertise in coaching students.

name: Raul L
bio: An accomplished BP debater with experience at ICYD and Imperial Schools. Raul has been a finalist in multiple intra-school tournaments and mentors younger debaters.

name: Valmik D
achievements: 2nd best open speaker US Nationals 2026
Youngest member, Team Hong Kong Development Squad
Won U17 Finals, Oxford WSDC (2025)
13th Best Speaker, Hong Kong Debate Open
bio: The youngest member of the Team Hong Kong Development Squad, with experience in both BP and WSDC formats. He recently won the U17 finals of Oxford WSDC 2025 and was the 13th-best speaker in the Hong Kong Debate Open.

name: Arthur Z
achievements: 2nd Place Team & Top Speaker, Harvard International PF Tournament Open Division (2023)
NSDA Global Excellent Debater (2020)
bio: A top-performing PF debater: 2nd Place Team and Top Speaker at the 2023 Harvard International PF Tournament (Open Division), with past top finishes in 2022 and 2021. NSDA Global Excellent Debater (2020) and 1st Place at Winchester College’s Inter-boarding house Debating Competition(Yaw Pot). Arthur brings his wealth of experience to lead our upcoming Public Forum course.

name: Aarohan S
achievements: 1st/70 teams, Top Speaker, Semifinalist, Asia Pre-WSDC (2026)
Grand Finals, 2/75+ teams, 3rd Open Speaker, 2nd Open Break, McMaster HST (2026)
Grand Finals, 3/30+ teams, 2nd Open Speaker, 3rd Open Break, EDS Spring Capital Cup (2026)
Semifinals, 6/45 teams, 10th Open Speaker, 6th Open Break, Queen's HST (2026)
bio: Aarohan is a highly accomplished competitor with results spanning Asia Pre-WSDC, McMaster HST, EDS Spring Capital Cup, Queen's HST, EDC, Ridge, SEED, QHST, UBC Summer HST, and HHWO. As Head of Outreach, he combines strong competitive credentials with a drive to expand DebateCraft's reach to new students and schools.

name: Kevin C
bio: Works on digital outreach and debate content creation, helping expand our online presence. He brings experience from his web design role on the Exonian Web Board.

name: Alston G
achievements: Semifinalist and Top Open Breaking Team, Asia WSDC (2026)
Open Grand Champion & 2nd Open Speaker, South Asia Schools BP (2026)
Competed at McMaster High School BP Tournament(2026)
Open Semifinalist, Vietnam InterVarsity Debate Championships(2026)
Open Grand Finalist, Hart House Summer Open (2025)
bio: As Open Grand Champion, 2nd Open Speaker at South Asia Schools BP 2026, Open Grand Finalist, 2025 Hart House Summer Open, and McMaster High School BP Tournament, Alston brings a wealth of debating competitiveness success and expert round vision that can support our most advanced debaters to reach the next level of their debating careers.

name: Isaac Y
achievements: Representing Canada at US Nationals (2026)
Junior Champion at Western Winter HST Oxford Qualifier (2025)
bio: Representing Canada at US Nationals 2026, Issac is a internationally recognized debater with a consistent record of reaching the top of speaker rankings. He can support students aiming for the highest levels of debating success, and has experience in both coaching and administration.

name: Cici C
achievements: Team Hong Kong WSDC Development Team member
Quarterfinalist, Stanford Invitational (2026)
bio: A member of the Team Hong Kong WSDC Development Team and Advanced Debate Team at Phillips Exeter Academy, she has had numerous successes across Asian circuits and brings a wealth of debate knowledge.

name: Piers K
achievements: Team HK WSDC Development Team member
16th Breaking Team, Vietnam Asian Schools Debating Championships (2026)
bio: Member of Team HK WSDC Development team and author of a daily current affairs newsletter

name: Rachel R
achievements: Captain, German Swiss International School Debate Team
Semifinalist & 7th Best Speaker, Hong Kong Junior Schools Debating Competition (2026)
Open Quarterfinalist, Indo-Pacific WSDO (2025)
U14 Champion, Indo-Pacific WSDO (2024)
bio: The captain of the German Swiss International School Debate Team, Rachel brings both individual and team successes most recently semifinalist at the Hong Kong Junior Schools Debating Competition 2026, individually the seventh best speaker, open-quarterfinalist in Indo-Pacific WSDO 2025, and U14 Champion in Indo-Pacific WSDO 2024. She

name: Theodore W
achievements: Trainer, Chongqing WSDC Workshop (2024)
Judge, Nanjing WSDC (2025)
3rd Best Speaker, Vietnam Asian Schools Debating Championships (2025)
bio: Trainer at Chongqing WSDC workshop 2024, Judged at Nanjing WSDC 2025,3rd best speaker at the 2025 Vietnam Asian Schools Debating Championships, and consistently broken at several other tournaments.

name: Andre C
bio: A seasoned debater with experience in both WSDC and BP formats. Andre contributes to curriculum design and training with his 4+ years of experience.

name: Hirannya K
achievements: Grand Finalist, Qatar Prep Schools Debate League
bio: Grand finalist of Qatar Prep Schools Debate League and octofinalist in international competitions

name: Larissa V
achievements: CISWSDC Grand Champion & U16 Best Speaker
1st Break (U16), MIWSDC (2024)
Semifinalist, Asia Pacific WSDC and Junior Schools Debating Championship (2026)
bio: Running and captaining training sessions for the GSIS junior school team, Larissa's record includes being the CISWSDC Grand Champion and U16 Best Speaker. She broke 1st (U16) at MIWSDC 2024 and was a semifinalist at both the Asia Pacific WSDC and the 2026 Junior Schools Debating Championship.

name: Sanaya S
achievements: 4th Best Team, Junior Schools Debating Championships (2026)
13th Best Team, Junior Schools Debating Championships (2024)
bio: A German Swiss International School Debate Club Co-leader, Sanaya has competed at Junior Schools Debating Championships for the past three years and specialized in drilling micro-skills that students can apply in rounds.

name: Tanvi M
achievements: 12th Best Speaker, Team Canada Summer WSDC National Open (2026)
Semifinalist, Hart House Debate Tournament (2025)
9th Best Speaker, UBC Summer HST (2025)
Finalist, YPC HST and Debateability Summer Championships (2025)
bio: Semifinalist for Hart House Debate Tournament 2025 and UBC Summer HST 2025 where she was the 9th place speaker. Finalist in YPC HST 2025 and Debateability Summer Championships 2025

name: Vera H
achievements: Semifinalist & 8th Best Speaker, Hong Kong Junior Schools Debate Competition (2026)
U14 Champion, Indo-Pacific WSDO (2025)
Finalist & 2nd Best Speaker, World Forensics League WSDC Spring Qualifiers
bio: An experienced WSDC debater, who recently was a semifinalist at the Hong Kong Junior Schools Debate Competition 2026, individually eighth best speaker, U14 Champion of the Indo-Pacific WSDO 2025, as well as a finalist and 2nd best speaker at the World Forensics League WSDC Spring Qualifiers.

name: Eric J
achievements: Drexel Open (2026)
3rd Place, Team Canada Fundraiser (2025)
3rd Place, Carroll College Fundraiser (2025)
bio: A BP debater who recently placed 3rd at the Team Canada Fundraiser 2025 and at the Carroll College(University) Fundraiser 2025.

name: Calvin M
bio: A BP debater who recently placed 3rd at the Team Canada Fundraiser 2025 and at the Carroll College(University) Fundraiser 2025.

name: Winston C
bio: Winston has debate and moot experience from both DBS and Winchester College. He specializes in helping new ESL debaters.

name: Chelsea Z
achievements: Quarterfinalist, JV Lincoln-Douglas, Harvard National Speech and Debate Tournament
6th Place, Lincoln-Douglas, DSDL 3
bio: A Quarterfinalist in JV Lincoln Douglas at Harvard National Speech and Debate Tournament, and coming 6th place in Lincoln Douglas at DSDL 3, Chelsea brings an exceptional background in prepared debate formats to the DebateCraft team.

name: Matthew H
bio: Matthew is a proficient PF debater regularly breaking quarterfinals and above in the NSDA China circuit.

name: Dowan K
bio: Dowan has WSDC experience having competed in local WSDC competitions in Korea

name: Oliver C
achievements: Published biophysics research papers
bio: A passionate biophysicist with published papers, Oliver regularly interacts with and discusses bioethical issues.

name: Emmanuel Z
achievements: Conducted cancer research at HKU
bio: Emmanuel is a debater at Phillips Exeter Academy. He embodies the DebateCraft mission to democratize science research for all students after conducting cancer research at HKU.

name: Jessica F
achievements: Silver Tournament of Champions, Public Forum
USABO Semifinalist
bio: Having reached silver Tournament of Champions for PF, and a USABO semifinalist, Jessica is a commited and knowledgable coach and epidemiology Instructor.

name: Aloysius Y
bio: Aloysius supports both coaching and program logistics.

name: Andrew C
bio: Andrew supports debate content creation and helps maintain communication with parents. He has his own PF debate experience, giving him an understanding of the practical needs students face while preparing and learning.

name: Ana T
bio: A student leader with a year of Public Forum (PF) debate experience, she’s passionate about helping others learn and contributes to every team with focus, energy, and a steady drive to grow.

name: Theo O
bio: With a background in entrepreneurship and marketing, Theo drives the team’s outreach strategy and engagement efforts.

name: Max L
bio: Having multiple professional social media accounts, shot videos for the Exonian, and a talented hobbyist photographer, Max brings a wealth of experience to our social media content creation team.

name: Vivien S
bio: Creates engaging content across social media platforms to achieve our mission of democratizing access to debate through free content. Vivien spent the summer TAing students and has experience in both teaching and encouraging students.

name: Sophia C
bio: Through music-based outreach activities with elderly individuals and creating supply packages for community members for MLK Day, Sophia has develop strong communication skills by interacting with individuals seeking support and connection.

name: Andy L
bio: Works on digital outreach and visual media, helping reach new students. He brings experience from the Exonian Web Board.
